subject: SYSTEMIC: False Evidence Claims in Layer 2 Validations

content.issue: Pattern of inaccurate validation claims from Layer 2 validators
content.pattern_detected: Multiple false claims about test results and evidence

affected_beads.actual: Multiple test failures, empty screenshot directories
Failures in webkit, Mobile Chrome, Mobile Safari - more widespread
No auth pattern tests found, claims unverifiable
affected_beads.status: PARTIAL - files exist but evidence insufficient

affected_beads.actual: Evidence documents E2E test failures but still claimed pass

content.root_cause_analysis: Layer 2 validation process is not performing proper verification before making claims. Validators are claiming work is complete without actually verifying evidence exists or tests pass.
systemic_failures: False test result reporting (claiming pass rates without verification)
Missing evidence (claiming screenshots exist when directories are empty)
Inaccurate scope of failures (understating browser compatibility issues)
Verification bypassing (making claims without running actual verification steps)
content.recommendation: Immediate coaching of Layer 2 validation process. Implement mandatory evidence verification steps before any Layer 2 validation can be marked complete.
